en_title: Until Dawn 2 Revealed for PS5 at PlayStation State of Play
subtitle: 新园长上工
opus_summary: 在6月State of Play发布会上，索尼第一方工作室Firesprite正式公布《直到黎明2》，计划2027年登陆PS5。本作将背景从雪山转移到热带，主角团换成一档灵异频道的主播们，他们从未见过真正的超自然现象，直到这次直面恐怖。蝴蝶效应机制回归，神秘希尔医生确认由Peter Stormare回归饰演。

paragraphs.en: First-party PlayStation developer Firesprite came to the State of Play June 2026 showcase to reveal Until Dawn 2 with plans to launch for PS5 in 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼第一方工作室Firesprite在2026年6月的State of Play发布会上正式公布了《直到黎明2》，计划于2027年登陆PS5。

paragraphs.en: First footage of what already looks to be a star-studded follow-up revealed quite the change of pace from Supermassive Games' winter-set original . This time around, it looks like players can expect to head to a more tropical setting for a story that follows a group of ghost hunters.
paragraphs.cn: 首段预告片显示，这部众星云集的续作与Supermassive Games开发的初代冬日雪山背景截然不同。这次玩家将前往热带地区，跟随一群灵异猎人的脚步展开故事。

paragraphs.en: "Our cast this time is a crew of ghost hunters, the faces behind the wildly popular paranormal channel, Dead True.. Only, well… they’ve never actually seen anything supernatural," a story description for Until Dawn 2 shared on the PlayStation.blog said. "The scares they are known for are, let’s say, a little staged. But all that changes when for the very first time, they come face-to-face with real horrors and must start living up to their reputation to survive until dawn."
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation.blog上发布的《直到黎明2》剧情描述写道：「我们这次的演员阵容是一群灵异猎人，他们是超人气灵异频道《死真探》的幕后团队。只不过……他们从未真正见过超自然现象。他们赖以成名的惊吓桥段，嗯，多少有点表演成分。但这一切都将改变——当他们第一次直面真正的恐怖时，必须拿出真本事，活到黎明。」

paragraphs.en: Elsewhere in its PlayStation.blog post, Sony says Until Dawn features a modern horror experience filled with "intrigue, emotion, twists, and the kind of choices that will keep you up at night." It's the kind of promise that is to be expected after the original game offered similar stakes more than 10 years ago, and with the end of today's trailer spelling out that "everyone can live" and "everyone can die," there is probably more than a few ways to kill off that new cast.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼在PlayStation.blog的其他部分表示，《直到黎明》将带来充满「悬疑、情感、反转和让你夜不能寐的选择」的现代恐怖体验。这并不令人意外——初代在十多年前就曾带来过类似的紧张感。而今天预告片结尾明确写道「所有人都能活」和「所有人都能死」，看来新主角团的死法恐怕不止一种。

paragraphs.en: It's been 11 years since the original Until Dawn launched for PS4 and just a few months since its remake came to PS5. After last year's live-action movie brought the franchise to another new setting, it looks like the PlayStation team has been slowly prepping fans for today's reveal.
paragraphs.cn: 距离初代《直到黎明》登陆PS4已过去11年，而距离其重制版登陆PS5也仅过了几个月。在去年真人电影将该系列带入全新场景之后，PlayStation团队似乎一直在为今天的公布做铺垫。

paragraphs.en: Until Dawn 2's connections to the universe of stories it's joining remain to be seen, but we do know that the series' Butterfly Effect mechanic will be making a comeback. There's also the trailer's tease that the enigmatic Dr. Hill is back, too, with Peter Stormare confirmed to reprise his role.
paragraphs.cn: 《直到黎明2》与系列其他故事宇宙的关联尚待揭晓，但我们已经知道，系列的「蝴蝶效应」机制将回归。预告片还暗示神秘希尔医生也将回归，Peter Stormare确认再次饰演该角色。

paragraphs.en: "Like many of you, a bunch of us on the team are massive fans of the original Until Dawn, so getting to build the sequel has been a dream come true," a message from the Firesprite team said. "Part of our mission from day one has been honoring that core DNA: character drama, tough choices, and those unforgettable horror moments that made the first game so special."
paragraphs.cn: Firesprite团队在寄语中表示：「和你们许多人一样，我们团队中不少人也是初代《直到黎明》的忠实粉丝，因此能够制作续作简直是梦想成真。从第一天起，我们的使命之一就是致敬其核心DNA：角色戏剧、艰难抉择，以及那些让初代如此特别的难忘恐怖时刻。」

paragraphs.en: The studio told fans eager to learn more about Until Dawn 2 to expect more information about its story, cast, and gameplay in the coming months. Here's everything announced at State of Play June 2026 if you need a catch-up on everything PlayStation revealed.
paragraphs.cn: 工作室告诉渴望了解更多《直到黎明2》信息的粉丝，未来几个月将公布更多关于剧情、演员阵容和玩法的细节。如果你想了解PlayStation在2026年6月State of Play上公布的所有内容，请点击这里。

虚构频道名，根据剧情意译
